summary: Comprehensive backend testing of Safe-Spend core escrow/spend/rules engine functionality completed. 73 tests across 13 sections (T1-T13) covering testing-core.md requirements. All tests PASS.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (429) can occur during rapid sequential requests - expected behavior but tests needed adjustment

critical_code_review_comments: IMPORTANT: Policies must be created with 'draft: false' for rules to be enforced. Default is draft mode.
Agent keys (sk_agent_*) have restricted permissions - cannot create escrows, policies, or manage API keys
AAV (Agent Authority Vault) signature verification is MOCKED - accepts any signature >10 chars

test_credentials.note: Test creates unique user per run via POST /api/v1/auth/signup

seed_data_creation: Each test creates its own escrow accounts, policies, and API keys with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comprehensive backend testing completed for testing-core.md requirements. All 73 tests across 13 sections pass. Key findings: 1) Policies must have 'draft: false' for rules to be enforced. 2) Agent keys have restricted permissions. 3) AAV verification is MOCKED. 4) Rate limiting (429) can occur during rapid requests. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_core_escrow_rules_engine.py
mocked_api_note: AAV (Agent Authority Vault) token/signature verification is MOCKED - accepts any signature >10 chars. Full JWT verification will be implemented when AAV service is available.
